title: 6 dig Commands for Faster DNS Debugging
summary: Check DNS records faster with dig commands for full answers, short A and AAAA results, MX and TXT lookups, resolver checks, and trace-style debugging.

test_environment.runtime: dig from BIND tools or compatible

verification_setup: Replace the example domain or resolver if needed.
Use a network that allows outbound DNS lookups.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/dig_commands_for_faster_dns_debugging.sh against real domains or resolvers.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example domain or resolver; responses vary with live DNS and network conditions.
